series_metadata.series_title: Internal Audit Dept Monitoring of Secure Access to Toll Audit Dept & Customer Service Center
series_metadata.series_description: Weekly reports, visitor logs, and master list of authorized personnel to access Toll Audit Department and Customer Service Center at the Commission's Administration Building in Berea, Ohio

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Maintain weekly reports and visitor logs one (1) year, current year--date. Maintain Master List of Authorized personnel one (1) year, current year--date
